description_long: This is a military-style airplane with a streamlined, dark green fuselage and swept-back wings featuring white cross insignias. The aircraft has a pair of jet engines mounted at the rear of the fuselage, just ahead of the tail section. Its tail design includes a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer, both with angular, sharp lines. The landing gear is deployed, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels visible. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, likely with a single seat. The overall appearance suggests a mid-20th-century jet fighter, with a hard, metallic exterior and minimal surface ornamentation.
description: A dark green, swept-wing military jet with rear-mounted engines, single vertical tail, and white cross insignias. Features an enclosed forward cockpit and deployed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the streamlined fuselage, swept-back wings, single vertical tail, and deployed landing gear.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin jet engines, angular tail, and the full span of the swept wings with insignias.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the landing gear and tail structure.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and the wide, swept-back wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with moderate anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels, deployed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single seat and streamlined canopy.
